messages.content: 中译英：依托我的全球投资经验和公司作为中美合资的独特跨境投资平台优势，多年专注于新能源电力行业，擅长挖掘稳定收益资产及高潜在收益股权投资相结合，能为香港企业在ESG项目融资、投资以及产品开发方面提供专业辅导。其次在家族办公室，也能提供投资组合，基金组合等资产管理方面，也能从投资的角度提供援助。以上均能为香港的金融市场引入更多的资产投资项目，促进可持续发展和创造新的机遇。

With my global investment experience and a unique cross-border investment platform as a Sino-US joint venture, I have been focusing on the new energy power industry for many years. I am skilled at exploring the combination of stable income assets and high-potential equity investments, and can provide professional guidance for Hong Kong companies in ESG project financing, investment, and product development. Additionally, in the family office, I can also provide assistance in asset management such as investment portfolio and fund composition. All of the above can introduce more asset investment projects to the financial market in Hong Kong, promote sustainable development, and create new opportunities.

润色如下内容：With my global investment experience and a unique cross-border investment platform as a Sino-US joint venture, I have been focusing on the new energy power industry for many years. I am skilled at exploring the combination of stable income assets and high-potential equity investments, and can provide professional guidance for Hong Kong companies in ESG project financing, investment, and product development. Additionally, in the family office, I can also provide assistance in asset management such as investment portfolio and fund composition. All of the above can introduce more asset investment projects to the financial market in Hong Kong, promote sustainable development, and create new opportunities.

Drawing on my extensive global investment experience and leveraging the unique advantages of my company as a Sino-US joint venture and a distinguished cross-border investment platform, I have dedicated years to the new energy power industry. I have honed my expertise in uncovering a blend of stable income assets and high-potential equity investments. As a result, I am well-equipped to offer professional guidance to Hong Kong enterprises in areas such as ESG project financing, investment, and product development. Furthermore, within the realm of family offices, I can provide invaluable assistance in asset management, encompassing investment portfolios and fund composition. By introducing a plethora of asset investment projects to Hong Kong's financial market, my intentions are to foster sustainable development and unlock fresh opportunities.
中译英：我目前在牵头负责与周大福家族办公室共同设立清洁能源基金，共同管理基金并投资于具有潜力的清洁能源企业，实现双方共同的投资回报。同时，合作双方还共同探索并投资于清洁能源板块的其他领域和项目，推进清洁能源技术的研发和商业化应用，实现环保和经济的双赢。

I am currently leading the effort to establish a clean energy fund in collaboration with the Chow Tai Fook family office. Together, we will manage the fund and invest in promising clean energy companies, aiming to achieve mutual investment returns. Additionally, both parties will jointly explore and invest in other sectors and projects within the clean energy field, advancing research and development efforts and commercial applications of clean energy technologies. Our goal is to achieve a win-win situation for the environment and the economy by promoting sustainability.

I am currently spearheading the establishment of a clean energy fund in partnership with the Chow Tai Fook family office. Our joint focus is on managing the fund and investing in promising clean energy enterprises, aiming to generate mutually beneficial investment returns. Furthermore, we are actively exploring and investing in other areas and projects within the clean energy sector, seeking to advance the research and commercialization of clean energy technologies. Our ultimate objective is to create a harmonious synergy between environmental preservation and economic prosperity, ensuring a win-win situation for all stakeholders.
中译英：中国保险资产管理业协会在2022年颁发的“A类保险资金投资的私募股权投资基金管理人”
"The A-Class Private Equity Investment Fund Manager for Insurance Fund Investment" awarded by the China Insurance Asset Management Association in 2022
润色如下内容：“The A-Class Private Equity Investment Fund Manager for Insurance Fund Investment” awarded by the China Insurance Asset Management Association in 2022
"The A-Class Private Equity Investment Fund Manager for Insurance Fund Investment" was awarded to us by the China Insurance Asset Management Association in 2022.
中译英：首批海南省合格境内有限合伙人(QDLP)境外投资者”
"The First Batch of Qualified Domestic Limited Partners (QDLP) Overseas Investors in Hainan Province"
中译英：“新能源项目股权收购专家”
"Expert in Equity Acquisition of New Energy Projects"
中译英：风力发电职业培训证书
"Certificate in Wind Power Generation Vocational Training"
